ROIs / AOIs - Info

Polygons - alongside the tissue shape

Around 200-250 cells for each AOI

LSI, NSI and TSI ROIs (400-500 cells) are segmented into 2 AOIs using PanCK

14-32 AOIs for each sample

AOIs In total: 192 LSI, 50 NSI, 20 TSI, 54 Lesion, 55 Stroma, 3 Epithelia + 4 NTCs
